---
title: "Forensics Analytics & Accounting"
format: html
---

### Learning Objectives of the Chapter {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-note title = "Learning Objectives" collapse = "true"}
::: {style="text-align: justify"}
At the End of the Chapter, Students should be Able to -

- Gain an understanding about the fraud and its implications 

- Learn about different risk management techniques applied for fraud identification and detection

- Learn different techniques of Fraud and Forensic Analytics 

::: 

::: 


## Techniques for Fraud Detection

## Risk Assessment Models

## Case Studies in Fraud Detection
